root.name: Add textbox and adjust diagram on slide 7 per specification
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent (1) added a new textbox with the correct content positioned below the aircraft diagram, and (2) resized the aircraft image to prevent overlap between the new textbox and the image.

children.name: Textbox with correct text is added on slide 7
children.description: Checks that a textbox containing exactly the required text has been added to slide 7.

children.name: Textbox is positioned below aircraft diagram on slide 7
children.description: Verifies that the inserted textbox is below the aircraft diagram on slide 7.

children.name: No overlap between textbox and diagram image
children.description: Verifies that the textbox and the image do not overlap (i.e., the image was resized or moved to avoid overlap).

children.name: No extraneous changes to slide 7 or other slides
children.description: Checks that only the described textbox and image adjustments were made to slide 7, and no unrelated extraneous modifications made to any slide.

metadata.task: On slide 7, Add a new text box that says Elevators control the pitch attitude of the aircraft positioned below the aircraft diagram. Resize the image to avoid overlap.
